summary: The user sought advice on establishing a consistent morning yoga routine and improving their breathing techniques during practice. They shared their experience with yoga over the past three months, including trying restorative yoga at Yoga Bliss and using the Down Dog app. The session included tips for setting up a restorative practice at home and preparing for an upcoming yoga workshop focused on alignment and proper form.
facts: The user has been practicing yoga for about 3 months and has noticed it helps with stress relief. The user recently attended a restorative yoga class at Yoga Bliss, where they used blocks and bolsters for support. The user has been using the Down Dog app to guide them through breathing exercises. The user is considering signing up for a yoga workshop next month focused on alignment and proper form. The user is trying to establish a morning yoga routine and is interested in incorporating restorative yoga into it. The user has been practicing yoga at least 2-3 times a week leading up to the workshop. The user is looking for tips on how to sequence a restorative yoga practice for a morning routine. The user is interested in learning about good yoga YouTube channels and online resources for home practice.
